items.name_cn:
Caramel Calfskin with Canvas
Extraordinary lightweight texture, named for the exquisite Y logo inspired by the fashion house's archival designs.
Elegant and structured, the handle features a hollow-out design and comes with an adjustable detachable shoulder strap for various carrying options.
Gives a casual, lazy, yet full-of-personality vibe. Unisex, suitable as a briefcase or travel tote, with extra-large capacity.
Model: 800224
Dimensions: 23×29.5×3-8.5cm
Handle Height: 7cm
Shoulder Strap Length: 48cm

items.name_cn:
CARO Handbag M9241
The Caro Handbag is crafted from calfskin leather, featuring a quilted detail with the iconic houndstooth stitching. The back features a '30 Montaigne' embossed logo, and the flap is adorned with a vintage gold-finish metal 'CD' clasp, inspired by the stopper of a Christian Dior perfume bottle. The small size comes with a detachable iconic 'CD' chain strap, which can also be replaced with a braided wide strap for a more elegant and stylish look. It is easy to carry for both daily looks and evening parties.
Number: M9241
Dimensions: 20 x 12 x 7 cm

items.name_cn:
CARO Handbag M9243
The Caro Handbag is crafted from calfskin, featuring a quilted detail with the iconic diagonal stitching. The back features a debossed "30 Montaigne" logo. Soft material with a vintage gold-finish metal "CD" clasp on the flap, inspired by the stopper of a Christian Dior perfume bottle. Large size, equipped with a detachable iconic "CD" chain-link shoulder strap, which can also be replaced with an embroidered wide strap for a more elegant look. Effortlessly suitable for daily wear or evening parties.
Number: M9243
Dimensions: 28 x 17 x 9 cm

items.name_cn:
CD ❣❣️️ SIGNATURE Oval Camera Bag
This CD Signature oval camera bag is a new arrival from the Fall 2023 Ready-to-Wear collection, presented by Maria Grazia Chiuri, blending practical design with Dior's modern spirit. Crafted from white calfskin, it features a distinctive CD embossed logo on the front, showcasing Dior's exquisite craftsmanship. The spacious compartment features three internal card slots and a double-zip closure. It comes with a leather top handle and an adjustable, detachable chain strap with leather detailing, allowing it to be carried by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody, making it an ideal daily companion.
Front featuring CD embossed logo
Spacious internal compartment
Double-zip closure with zip pull
Detachable, adjustable chain strap with leather detailing
Leather handle
3 card slots
Model: 1293
Size: 18*6*11cm
